en.text: a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb (ὄνομαι, to slur); for which another prolonged form (ὀνάω) is used as an alternate in some tenses (unless indeed it be identical with the base of G3686 through the idea of notoriety); to gratify, i.e. (middle voice) to derive pleasure or advantage from

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb (ὄνομαι, to slur); for which another prolonged form (ὀνάω) is used as an alternate in some tenses (unless indeed it be identical with the base of G3686 through the idea of notoriety); to gratify, i.e. (middle voice) to derive pleasure or advantage from
